text:
<start_of_turn>user
Registration Act kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Registration Act (Registration Act 1908) Registration Act ke under aata hai jo 1908 mein enacted hua. Status: Active. Yeh Property Parties par apply hota hai. Key provisions: Compulsory registration of documents relating to property. Authority: Sub-Registrar Office.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Salary Slip Mandatory kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Salary Slip Mandatory (Code on Wages 2019) Code on Wages ke under aata hai jo 2019 mein enacted hua. Status: Active. Yeh All Employees par apply hota hai. Key provisions: Employer har employee ko salary slip dena legally bound hai; digital slip valid. Authority: Labour Commissioner.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Muslim Women ke kya adhikar hain Muslim Women Protection Act ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Muslim Women (Protection of Rights on Marriage) Act ke tahat Muslim Women ke adhikar: Triple talaq criminalized; imprisonment up to 3 years. Kisi bhi problem ke liye Magistrate Court se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is Right Against Exploitation under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Right Against Exploitation falls under Constitution of India (Article 23-24), enacted in 1950. Status: Active. Applies to: All Citizens. Key provisions: Prohibition of trafficking and forced labour. Enforced by: Supreme Court / High Court.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Anti-Ragging Complaint kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Anti-Ragging Complaint (UGC Anti-Ragging Regulations 2009) UGC Regulations on Curbing Ragging ke under aata hai jo 2009 mein enacted hua. Status: Active. Yeh Students par apply hota hai. Key provisions: 1800-180-5522 helpline; FIR darj hogi; college ka NAAC grade affect hoga. Authority: Anti-Ragging Committee / Police.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Tenants ke kya adhikar hain Security Deposit Limit ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Model Tenancy Act ke tahat Tenants ke adhikar: Residential: max 2 months rent deposit; Commercial: max 6 months rent deposit. Kisi bhi problem ke liye Rent Authority / Courts se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Mujhe Transgender Persons Act ke baare mein legal advice chahiye.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Transgender Persons Act ke baare mein zaroori jaankari: Yeh Transgender Persons par laagu hota hai. Recognition of transgender identity; prohibition of discrimination. Koi bhi issue hone par National Council / Courts se sampark karein. Reference: TP Act 2019 - Transgender Persons (Protection of Rights) Act.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is PMLA Amendment 2023 - Bail under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
PMLA Amendment 2023 - Bail falls under Prevention of Money Laundering Act (Bail Provisions) (Section 45 PMLA), enacted in 2023. Status: Active. Applies to: PMLA Accused. Key provisions: Twin conditions for bail in money laundering cases upheld by courts. Enforced by: Special PMLA Court.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Security Deposit Limit kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Security Deposit Limit (MTA Section 11) Model Tenancy Act ke under aata hai jo 2021 mein enacted hua. Status: Active. Yeh Tenants par apply hota hai. Key provisions: Residential: max 2 months rent deposit; Commercial: max 6 months rent deposit. Authority: Rent Authority / Courts.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Mujhe Theft ke baare mein legal advice chahiye.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Theft ke baare mein zaroori jaankari: Yeh All Persons par laagu hota hai. Dishonest taking of movable property. Koi bhi issue hone par Magistrate Court se sampark karein. Reference: Section 303 BNS - Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Railways Act kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Railways Act (Railways Act 1989) Railways Act ke under aata hai jo 1989 mein enacted hua. Status: Active. Yeh Railway Passengers par apply hota hai. Key provisions: Safety, operations and services of railways; compensation. Authority: Railway Claims Tribunal.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Mujhe Hindu Marriage Act ke baare mein legal advice chahiye.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Hindu Marriage Act ke baare mein zaroori jaankari: Yeh Hindus par laagu hota hai. Marriage, divorce, maintenance for Hindus, Buddhists, Sikhs, Jains. Koi bhi issue hone par Family Court se sampark karein. Reference: HMA 1955 - Hindu Marriage Act.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
SC & ST Prevention of Atrocities Act kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
SC & ST Prevention of Atrocities Act (PoA Act 1989) Scheduled Castes and Scheduled Tribes (Prevention of Atrocities) Act ke under aata hai jo 1989 mein enacted hua. Status: Active (Amended 2018). Yeh SC/ST Communities par apply hota hai. Key provisions: Protection of SC/ST from atrocities; special courts. Authority: Special Court.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Mujhe Citizenship Act ke baare mein legal advice chahiye.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Citizenship Act ke baare mein zaroori jaankari: Yeh Foreigners & Citizens par laagu hota hai. Acquisition and termination of Indian citizenship; NRC. Koi bhi issue hone par Ministry of Home Affairs se sampark karein. Reference: Citizenship Act 1955 - Citizenship Act.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Mujhe Competition Act ke baare mein legal advice chahiye.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Competition Act ke baare mein zaroori jaankari: Yeh All Market Players par laagu hota hai. Prevention of anti-competitive practices; CCI regulation. Koi bhi issue hone par Competition Commission of India se sampark karein. Reference: Competition Act 2002 - Competition Act.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Fundamental Duties kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Fundamental Duties (Article 51A) Constitution of India (42nd Amendment) ke under aata hai jo 1976 mein enacted hua. Status: Active (Non-justiciable). Yeh All Citizens par apply hota hai. Key provisions: 11 fundamental duties of Indian citizens. Authority: N/A - Moral Obligation.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Mujhe Stamp Duty on E-Transactions ke baare mein legal advice chahiye.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Stamp Duty on E-Transactions ke baare mein zaroori jaankari: Yeh Digital Contract Parties par laagu hota hai. Electronic contracts valid; stamp duty implications for digital agreements. Koi bhi issue hone par Stamp Authority se sampark karein. Reference: IT Act Section 10A - Information Technology Act (Electronic Contracts).<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Chip Designers ke kya adhikar hain Semiconductor Layout Design ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Semiconductor Integrated Circuits Layout-Design Act ke tahat Chip Designers ke adhikar: Protection of semiconductor layout designs; 10-year term. Kisi bhi problem ke liye Semiconductor Registry se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Irretrievable Breakdown (Proposed) kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Irretrievable Breakdown (Proposed) (Marriage Laws Amendment Bill) Marriage Laws (Amendment) Bill ke under aata hai jo 2010 mein enacted hua. Status: Pending. Yeh Married Couples par apply hota hai. Key provisions: Divorce on grounds of irretrievable breakdown. Authority: Family Court / Parliament.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Home Loan Document Checklist kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Home Loan Document Checklist (RBI + NHB Guidelines) RBI and National Housing Bank Guidelines ke under aata hai jo 2022 mein enacted hua. Status: Active. Yeh Home Loan Applicants par apply hota hai. Key provisions: ID proof, income proof, ITR 3 saal, property documents, sale agreement, NOC from builder. Authority: Banks / NHB.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Mujhe Society Maintenance Dispute ke baare mein legal advice chahiye.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Society Maintenance Dispute ke baare mein zaroori jaankari: Yeh Apartment Owners par laagu hota hai. Society aapki parking ya amenities rokne ka adhikar nahi; maintenance rate BOD decide karta hai. Koi bhi issue hone par Registrar of Cooperative Societies se sampark karein. Reference: Cooperative Societies Act (State) - Various State Cooperative Societies Acts.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
UPI Fraud Victims ke kya adhikar hain UPI Fraud Complaint Process ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Information Technology Act & RBI Fraud Reporting Rules ke tahat UPI Fraud Victims ke adhikar: Immediately bank ko call karein; 1930 helpline par report karein; 24 ghante mein reverse possible. Kisi bhi problem ke liye Cyber Crime Portal / Police se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is Coastal Aquaculture Authority Act (Amendment) under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Coastal Aquaculture Authority Act (Amendment) falls under Coastal Aquaculture Authority (Amendment) Act (CAA Amendment 2023), enacted in 2023. Status: Active. Applies to: Aquaculture Farmers. Key provisions: Electronic licensing; shrimp seed import regulations. Enforced by: Coastal Aquaculture Authority.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Mujhe Administrative Tribunals Act ke baare mein legal advice chahiye.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Administrative Tribunals Act ke baare mein zaroori jaankari: Yeh Government Employees par laagu hota hai. Service matters of central government employees. Koi bhi issue hone par Central Administrative Tribunal se sampark karein. Reference: ATA 1985 - Administrative Tribunals Act.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is Food Quality Complaint under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Food Quality Complaint falls under Food Safety and Standards Act (Food Safety and Standards Act 2006), enacted in 2006. Status: Active. Applies to: Food Consumers. Key provisions: Kharab khana milne par FSSAI ko complaint karein; restaurant ka license cancel ho sakta hai. Enforced by: FSSAI / Consumer Commission.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Persons with Mental Illness ke kya adhikar hain Mental Healthcare Act ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Mental Healthcare Act ke tahat Persons with Mental Illness ke adhikar: Rights of persons with mental illness; advance directives. Kisi bhi problem ke liye Mental Health Review Board se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is Clinical Trial Rules under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Clinical Trial Rules falls under New Drugs and Clinical Trials Rules (CT Rules 2019), enacted in 2019. Status: Active (Amended 2023). Applies to: Pharma Companies & Patients. Key provisions: Ethics committee approval; informed consent; compensation for trial-related injury. Enforced by: CDSCO.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is Loan Agreement Red Flags under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Loan Agreement Red Flags falls under RBI Guidelines for Fair Practices Code for Lenders (RBI Fair Practices Code), enacted in 2015. Status: Active. Applies to: Borrowers. Key provisions: Hidden charges, prepayment penalty clause, floating rate terms dhyan se padhein. Enforced by: Banking Ombudsman / RBI.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
National Medical Commission Act kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
National Medical Commission Act (NMC Act 2020) National Medical Commission Act ke under aata hai jo 2020 mein enacted hua. Status: Active. Yeh Medical Institutions & Students par apply hota hai. Key provisions: Replaced MCI; undergraduate medical education regulation; exit exam. Authority: National Medical Commission.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is Social Media Defamation under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Social Media Defamation falls under Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita (BNS Section 356 + IT Act Section 66A struck down), enacted in 2023. Status: Active. Applies to: Defamation Victims. Key provisions: Online defamation par BNS 356 ke tahat case file karein; platform par bhi report karein. Enforced by: Police / Magistrate Court.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is Data Protection Act under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Data Protection Act falls under Digital Personal Data Protection Act (DPDP Act 2023), enacted in 2023. Status: Active (Rules pending 2025). Applies to: All Digital Entities. Key provisions: Data fiduciary obligations; consent framework; penalties up to 250 Cr. Enforced by: Data Protection Board.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Girl Child & Parents ke kya adhikar hain Beti Bachao Beti Padhao ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Beti Bachao Beti Padhao Scheme ke tahat Girl Child & Parents ke adhikar: Against sex-selective abortion; girl child education incentives. Kisi bhi problem ke liye Ministry of Women & Child Development se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Senior Citizens below Poverty Line ke kya adhikar hain Old Age Pension Schemes ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme ke tahat Senior Citizens below Poverty Line ke adhikar: Monthly pension for BPL citizens above 60 years. Kisi bhi problem ke liye State Social Welfare Department se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Mujhe Policy Lapse Revival ke baare mein legal advice chahiye.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Policy Lapse Revival ke baare mein zaroori jaankari: Yeh Life Insurance Policyholders par laagu hota hai. Lapsed policy 5 saal ke andar revive kar sakte hain; arrears + interest pay karke. Koi bhi issue hone par Insurance Company se sampark karein. Reference: IRDAI Life Insurance Regulations - IRDAI (Non-Linked Insurance Products) Regulations.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is Industrial Relations Code under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Industrial Relations Code falls under Industrial Relations Code (IRC 2020), enacted in 2020. Status: Active. Applies to: Employers & Workers. Key provisions: Trade unions, collective bargaining, industrial disputes. Enforced by: Labour Court.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Taxpayers ke kya adhikar hain Benami Black Money ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Black Money (Undisclosed Foreign Income) Act ke tahat Taxpayers ke adhikar: Taxation of undisclosed foreign income; heavy penalties. Kisi bhi problem ke liye Tax Authority se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is National Cybersecurity Strategy under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
National Cybersecurity Strategy falls under National Cyber Security Strategy (NCS 2020), enacted in 2020. Status: Active (Updated 2025). Applies to: All Digital Entities. Key provisions: Comprehensive cybersecurity policy; sector-specific guidelines. Enforced by: NSCS / MeitY.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Muslims ke kya adhikar hain Muslim Personal Law ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Muslim Personal Law (Shariat) Application Act ke tahat Muslims ke adhikar: Governs marriage, divorce, inheritance for Muslims. Kisi bhi problem ke liye Family Court se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Mujhe Patent Agent Examination ke baare mein legal advice chahiye.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Patent Agent Examination ke baare mein zaroori jaankari: Yeh Patent Agents par laagu hota hai. Qualification and examination for patent agents. Koi bhi issue hone par Indian Patent Office se sampark karein. Reference: Patent Agent Rules 2003 - The Patents Rules (Patent Agent).<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Mujhe Juvenile Justice Act ke baare mein legal advice chahiye.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Juvenile Justice Act ke baare mein zaroori jaankari: Yeh Children below 18 par laagu hota hai. Child welfare; JJB for children in conflict with law. Koi bhi issue hone par Juvenile Justice Board se sampark karein. Reference: JJ Act 2015 - Juvenile Justice (Care and Protection) Act.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Traffic Challan Rights kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Traffic Challan Rights (Motor Vehicles Act 1988) Motor Vehicles Act ke under aata hai jo 1988 mein enacted hua. Status: Active. Yeh Vehicle Owners par apply hota hai. Key provisions: E-challan ko 30 din mein contest kar sakte hain; without vehicle document original nahi de sakte. Authority: Traffic Court / RTO.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Identity Theft Online kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Identity Theft Online (IT Act Section 66C) Information Technology Act ke under aata hai jo 2000 mein enacted hua. Status: Active. Yeh Identity Theft Victims par apply hota hai. Key provisions: Identity theft par 3 saal jail + fine; fake account report karein; credit bureau ko bhi batayen. Authority: Cyber Crime Police.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
High Net Worth Individuals ke kya adhikar hain Wealth Tax (Repealed) ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Wealth Tax Act ke tahat High Net Worth Individuals ke adhikar: Abolished; replaced by additional income tax surcharge. Kisi bhi problem ke liye N/A se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is Transfer of Property under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Transfer of Property falls under Transfer of Property Act (TPA 1882), enacted in 1882. Status: Active. Applies to: Property Owners. Key provisions: Sale, mortgage, lease, exchange, gift of immovable property. Enforced by: Civil Court / Registration.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is Customs Act under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Customs Act falls under Customs Act (Customs Act 1962), enacted in 1962. Status: Active (Amended 2023). Applies to: Importers & Exporters. Key provisions: Import/export duties; customs procedures and penalties. Enforced by: Customs Authority / CESTAT.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Large Companies ke kya adhikar hain Competition Amendment Act 2023 ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Competition (Amendment) Act ke tahat Large Companies ke adhikar: Deal value threshold for mergers; settlement mechanism; hub & spoke cartel. Kisi bhi problem ke liye Competition Commission of India se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Mujhe CVC Act ke baare mein legal advice chahiye.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
CVC Act ke baare mein zaroori jaankari: Yeh Public Servants par laagu hota hai. Independent body to oversee vigilance in central government. Koi bhi issue hone par Central Vigilance Commission se sampark karein. Reference: CVC Act 2003 - Central Vigilance Commission Act.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Companies ke kya adhikar hain Companies Act ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Companies Act ke tahat Companies ke adhikar: Incorporation, management, winding up of companies. Kisi bhi problem ke liye NCLT / ROC se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Mujhe Sexual Harassment at Workplace ke baare mein legal advice chahiye.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Sexual Harassment at Workplace ke baare mein zaroori jaankari: Yeh Women Employees par laagu hota hai. Mandatory ICC in organizations; complaint mechanism. Koi bhi issue hone par Internal Complaints Committee se sampark karein. Reference: POSH Act - Sexual Harassment of Women at Workplace Act.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
UPI One World kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
UPI One World (UPI One World 2023) NPCI UPI One World for Foreign Nationals ke under aata hai jo 2023 mein enacted hua. Status: Active. Yeh Foreign Nationals in India par apply hota hai. Key provisions: UPI access for foreign nationals visiting India without Indian bank account. Authority: NPCI.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Mujhe Forgery ke baare mein legal advice chahiye.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Forgery ke baare mein zaroori jaankari: Yeh All Persons par laagu hota hai. Making false documents; forged currency. Koi bhi issue hone par Sessions Court / Magistrate se sampark karein. Reference: Section 336-340 BNS - Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is Rent Receipt Mandatory under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Rent Receipt Mandatory falls under Model Tenancy Act (MTA Section 8), enacted in 2021. Status: Active. Applies to: Tenants. Key provisions: Landlord har mahine rent receipt dene ke liye bound hai; digital receipt valid. Enforced by: Rent Authority.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
All Citizens ke kya adhikar hain Right to Equality ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Constitution of India ke tahat All Citizens ke adhikar: Equality before law; no discrimination by state. Kisi bhi problem ke liye Supreme Court / High Court se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is PM Gati Shakti Portal under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
PM Gati Shakti Portal falls under PM Gati Shakti - National Master Plan (PM GS Policy 2021), enacted in 2021. Status: Active (Ongoing 2026). Applies to: Infrastructure Developers. Key provisions: Multi-modal infrastructure connectivity; integrated planning. Enforced by: Ministry of Commerce & Industry.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
OCI Card Rules kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
OCI Card Rules (OCI Rules) Citizenship (Amendment) Rules (OCI Provisions) ke under aata hai jo 2004 mein enacted hua. Status: Active (Updated 2021). Yeh Indian Diaspora par apply hota hai. Key provisions: Overseas Citizen of India card; lifelong visa; property rights restricted. Authority: Ministry of Home Affairs.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is E-Waste Rules under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
E-Waste Rules falls under E-Waste (Management) Rules (E-Waste Rules 2022), enacted in 2022. Status: Active. Applies to: Electronics Manufacturers. Key provisions: EPR for electronics manufacturers; collection targets. Enforced by: Central Pollution Control Board.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Married Couples ke kya adhikar hain Irretrievable Breakdown (Proposed) ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Marriage Laws (Amendment) Bill ke tahat Married Couples ke adhikar: Divorce on grounds of irretrievable breakdown. Kisi bhi problem ke liye Family Court / Parliament se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Arbitration Clause in Contract kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Arbitration Clause in Contract (Arbitration and Conciliation Act 1996) Arbitration and Conciliation Act ke under aata hai jo 1996 mein enacted hua. Status: Active. Yeh Contracting Parties par apply hota hai. Key provisions: Contract mein arbitration clause ho toh pehle court nahi ja sakte; arbitration mandatory. Authority: Arbitral Tribunal.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is Home Loan Document Checklist under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Home Loan Document Checklist falls under RBI and National Housing Bank Guidelines (RBI + NHB Guidelines), enacted in 2022. Status: Active. Applies to: Home Loan Applicants. Key provisions: ID proof, income proof, ITR 3 saal, property documents, sale agreement, NOC from builder. Enforced by: Banks / NHB.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Mujhe Insurance Policy Checklist ke baare mein legal advice chahiye.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Insurance Policy Checklist ke baare mein zaroori jaankari: Yeh Insurance Buyers par laagu hota hai. Waiting period, exclusions, sum insured, cashless hospitals list, claim process - sabhi padhe. Koi bhi issue hone par Insurance Ombudsman se sampark karein. Reference: IRDAI Regulations - IRDAI (Protection of Policyholders Interests) Regulations.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
All Contracting Parties ke kya adhikar hain Contract Must Be in Writing? ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Indian Contract Act ke tahat All Contracting Parties ke adhikar: Verbal contracts bhi valid hain lekin proof nahi hota; written contract hamesha behtar. Kisi bhi problem ke liye Civil Court se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Overtime Pay Rules kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Overtime Pay Rules (Code on Wages 2019) Code on Wages ke under aata hai jo 2019 mein enacted hua. Status: Active. Yeh All Workers par apply hota hai. Key provisions: 9 ghante se zyada kaam par double rate OT pay milna chahiye; compensatory off bhi valid. Authority: Labour Commissioner.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Mujhe Arbitration Amendment 2021 ke baare mein legal advice chahiye.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Arbitration Amendment 2021 ke baare mein zaroori jaankari: Yeh Disputing Parties par laagu hota hai. Automatic stay on awards; qualification for arbitrators. Koi bhi issue hone par Arbitral Tribunal / Court se sampark karein. Reference: A&C Amendment 2021 - Arbitration and Conciliation (Amendment) Act.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Offer Letter vs Appointment Letter kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Offer Letter vs Appointment Letter (Industrial Employment Act 1946) Industrial Employment (Standing Orders) Act ke under aata hai jo 1946 mein enacted hua. Status: Active. Yeh Employees par apply hota hai. Key provisions: Offer letter conditional hota hai; appointment letter join karne ke baad milta hai legally binding. Authority: Labour Court.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Consumers ke kya adhikar hain Consumer Protection Act ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Consumer Protection Act ke tahat Consumers ke adhikar: Consumer rights; e-commerce regulation; CCPA established. Kisi bhi problem ke liye Consumer Commission se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Mujhe Start-Up Recognition ke baare mein legal advice chahiye.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Start-Up Recognition ke baare mein zaroori jaankari: Yeh Recognized Startups par laagu hota hai. DPIIT recognition criteria; Section 80-IAC tax holiday for 3 years. Koi bhi issue hone par DPIIT / Income Tax Authority se sampark karein. Reference: DPIIT Startup Registration Rules - Startup India - DPIIT Recognition and Tax Exemption Rules.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Businesses ke kya adhikar hain Trade Marks Act ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Trade Marks Act ke tahat Businesses ke adhikar: Registration and protection of trademarks. Kisi bhi problem ke liye Trade Marks Registry se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
